title: Update RFC: Godot visual style, awakening narrative, AI asset generation

comments.author: v.zoologov
comments.text: COMPLETED: Added 5 updates to RFC.md: (1) Cuphead visual ref + skeletal 2D + parallax depth, (2) Full awakening narrative (CLI→peripherals→tablet→blob→avatar), (3) AI asset generation via Stable Diffusion (AssetGenerator, LoRA, ~30-40min genesis), (4) AssetGenerator as new architecture component, (5) SD in bootstrap prerequisites. File grew 4677→5010 lines. No Russian text, all cross-refs valid.

comments.author: v.zoologov
comments.text: COMPLETED: All 10 changes applied to RFC.md (4043→4677 lines). Changes: (1) Added principle 2.6 Plugin Architecture, (2) Rewrote 3.2.3 Skill Registry→Skill Domain System, (3) Added section 3.6 Bootstrap, (4) Added 4.2.1 Claude Code Permission Model, (5) Expanded 5.4 Godot with two-layer architecture, (6) Added 8.4 Claude Code Lock + renumbered 8.5-8.7, (7) Updated Phase 0/1, (8) Updated repo structure skills/ subtree, (9) Updated Open Questions. Verified: no Russian text, section numbers consistent, cross-references valid.
